contexts.context: ...You came with the house, you and your <mark>brother</mark> Josef, Sudeten deutsche, Sudetendeutsche, made homeless...
...on Tuesday.  He had already informed Wystsan´s <mark>brother</mark> Dr. John Auden, Stephen Spender and oosthers of...
...for all when sitting beside the driver - my <mark>brother</mark>-in-law - on the road to St. Pölten...
